title: macrocalyx nyctelea
intro: Macrocalyx nyctelea, also known as the night-flowering or night-blooming star, is a tropical plant species native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Macrocalyx nyctelea include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe wounds, and prevent infections, making it a valuable remedy for skin conditions and minor injuries. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
